intellectual_property.title: 3. Intellectual Property
content: All content on this website (texts, images, projects) is the exclusive property of Camille LACROIX, unless otherwise stated.
Any reproduction, representation, modification or exploitation, in whole or in part, of this content is prohibited without prior authorization.

personal_data.title: 4. Personal Data
content: This website does not collect any personal data for commercial purposes.
The contact form only allows sending a message directly to the editor. The data entered is not stored or shared with third parties.
In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, correct and delete your data by contacting: mlle.lacroixcamille@gmail.com

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
content: This website does not use tracking or advertising cookies.
Technical cookies may be used for the proper functioning of the website.

liability.title: 6. Liability
content: The editor strives to keep the information on this website up to date and accurate, but cannot be held responsible for errors or omissions.
Links to third-party websites are provided for information purposes only. The editor is not responsible for the content of these websites.
